name: Crunchy Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Pre-heat oven to 375°F (190°C). Place sheets of foil on countertop for cooling cookies.
2. In a large bowl, combine brown sugar, shortening, milk, and vanilla. Beat at medium speed of electric mixer until well blended. Add egg and beat into creamed mixture.
3. Gradually mix in flour, salt, and baking soda into the creamed mixture just until combined. Stir in corn flakes and chocolate chips.
4. Drop rounded tablespoonfuls (15 mL) of dough 3 inches (7 cm) apart onto ungreased baking sheets.
5. Bake each sheet for 8 to 10 minutes (chewy cookies), or 11 to 13 minutes (crisp cookies). Do not overbake. Cool on the sheet for 2 minutes, then transfer cookies to foil to cool completely. Makes about 3 1/2 dozen cookies.
